text: Standing here, I am struck by the deliberate design of the space: bright lights, bold colors, and reflections in glass give a sense of creativity in motion. There is an underlying institutional calm—a blend of curiosity and expectation. The R+D signage and the words on the wall speak of research, innovation, and the human desire to shape the future. I feel both inspired and slightly apprehensive, as if on the cusp of encountering new ideas and possibilities. The anticipation of discovery lingers in the air, and I feel quietly hopeful.
